actual.name: actual
nodes: three-point anchor: pursuit, undone threads, vision
wandering agents across all knowledge domains
advancing inherited work vs. crystallizing new concept
actual.summary: A system that receives a user's half-formed inspiration, unfinished intellectual threads, and visualized vision, then deploys wandering AI agents across all knowledge domains to find structural matches — native and metaphorical — that allow the user to either advance existing work they've inherited, or crystallize and articulate a vague new concept into something livable and buildable. The theoretical seeds grounding the system are chaos theory (unpredictable traversal), Markov chains (state-transition without long memory), and the Heisenberg principle (partial knowledge as a productive, not deficient, state).

node_records.embedding_text: a system that accepts incomplete, vague, or inarticulate ideas as its primary input rather than requiring fully formed queries

node_records.text: three-point anchor: pursuit, undone threads, vision
node_records.embedding_text: anchoring a generative search using three coordinates — current active pursuit, unresolved inspirational threads, and the user's internal visualized destination

node_records.text: wandering agents across all knowledge domains
node_records.embedding_text: autonomous agents traversing unconstrained knowledge space — math, physics, theater, literature — without domain restriction

node_records.text: advancing inherited work vs. crystallizing new concept
node_records.embedding_text: a system serving two distinct modes: building on an existing published foundation, or giving form to an entirely original but unarticulated idea
using chaotic unpredictability as a feature rather than a bug — the path of exploration is unforeseeable and that is precisely the source of its value
each step in the agent's journey depends only on its current state, not its full history — short-memory navigation that enables drift without accumulating bias
the system operates productively on skeletal, incomplete understanding — a half-knowing that provides enough structure to navigate without collapsing into false certainty

essence.name: essence
essence.summary: The structural tension at the heart of this system is between vagueness and traction: the input is deliberately incomplete, yet the system must move with enough direction to produce useful resonance rather than pure noise. The user holds a ghost of a destination — not a map, but a felt sense — and the system must honor that ghost without pinning it down too early, because pinning it kills the discovery. The wandering must be free enough to find non-obvious matches, yet anchored enough that the matches actually serve the user's real intent. This is bounded chaos: the constraint is invisible but structurally load-bearing.

node_records.embedding_text: using an embodied, pre-articulate intuition as a directional signal rather than waiting for explicit formulation before beginning
a state of deliberate partial-knowing that generates more generative possibility than full specification would allow
freedom of movement held in tension with a structural anchor — the wandering is real, but it cannot drift so far that it loses the gravitational pull of the original intent
the goal is not to find the closest match in topic space but to find the thing that vibrates at the same structural frequency as the user's intent

search_queries: standing on shoulders vs blank slate
node_records.embedding_text: the system must serve two opposite starting positions — one where prior work exists and must be surpassed, and one where nothing exists yet and must be conjured from feeling
the process of a diffuse, atmospheric idea condensing into a specific, livable, buildable form through the accumulation of structural matches

mechanism.name: mechanism
nodes: soft field constraint enables high-entropy traversal
three-point triangulation produces navigable field without closing space
memoryless steps accumulate into meaningful drift
partial knowing is the productive state, not a deficiency to correct
structural resonance detection across domain boundaries
the past track is observable; the future path is not — and that asymmetry is load-bearing
mechanism.summary: The causal primitive operating here is: a system whose output value is proportional to the unpredictability of its traversal path cannot be driven by hard specification without destroying the value it is meant to produce — therefore, the constraint must be structural and gravitational rather than directive. The anchor does not tell the agent where to go; it creates a field that makes certain resonances feel closer than others, while leaving the path genuinely free. This is the same primitive that governs jazz improvisation over a chord structure, immune system diversity under self/non-self constraint, and scientific serendipity within a funded research question. The mechanism is: soft structural field enables high-entropy traversal while preserving low-entropy convergence at the output.

node_records.text: soft field constraint enables high-entropy traversal
search_queries: soft constraint vs hard rules in complex systems
node_records.embedding_text: systems that require unpredictable paths to generate value must be governed by gravitational structural fields rather than explicit rules, because explicit rules collapse the entropy that produces the value

node_records.text: three-point triangulation produces navigable field without closing space
search_queries: open search space with directional bias
node_records.embedding_text: providing three partial coordinates — current position, unresolved vector, and visualized destination — creates a navigable field without specifying a path, leaving discovery space intact

node_records.text: memoryless steps accumulate into meaningful drift
node_records.embedding_text: when each local step depends only on current state, the global trajectory is unpredictable yet non-random — the system drifts with structural coherence without being steered

node_records.text: partial knowing is the productive state, not a deficiency to correct
node_records.embedding_text: the system is designed to operate at Heisenberg resolution — enough structural skeleton to navigate, not enough specification to foreclose discovery; full resolution is the failure mode, not the goal

node_records.text: structural resonance detection across domain boundaries
node_records.embedding_text: the system's core operation is recognizing when a surface-dissimilar artifact from an unrelated domain exhibits the same causal or dynamic shape as the user's problem — topology matching, not topic matching

node_records.text: the past track is observable; the future path is not — and that asymmetry is load-bearing
node_records.embedding_text: in systems governed by chaos, the trajectory can be reconstructed but never predicted; this asymmetry is not a limitation to engineer around but the precise mechanism that makes serendipitous discovery possible

problem.name: problem
problem.content: I'm currently working on a system that helps people advance their concepts or the work they're currently working on. If there's a case or research that's already published, based on that inheritance, based on that work, we can advance it. If I'm the one who didn't want to be at the same level and I'm just having some similar inspirations and I wanted to take that method or research paper or concept to a next level — how can I do this? I'm making the system like that. Or I'm having a whole new concept: if there's a system I'm building and I wanted to make a feature out of it and I'm having some vague inspirations of that system but I don't know how to articulate it, I don't know how to make it live — there's a system that can do that part of it.

vision.name: vision
vision.content: If a person tells the inspiration, the pursuit, and any unfinished work or unfinished threads in their mind — some of the big inspirations — to the model, then the model has something to anchor against. These three information points — the current pursuit (whether half-baked or not), the undone inspirations, and the vision the user is actually visualizing in their brain — can give enough data to the model to keep intact its score and keep wandering around through the Internet to find native and metaphorical work in the respective domains, whether it's math, physics, psychology, or even theater, literature, anything.

current_map.name: current_map
current_map.content: Based on what I told you about this system, you can't be working on it without some theoretical seeds. I stumbled into many concepts — Heisenberg, Markov chain, chaos theory. Chaos theory is what lets the model wander the Internet unhindered, like total chaos. There's no prediction of where the model will go next, but we can track it. But that track is the past, not the future. We cannot predict where it will end up. That is the spontaneousness I want to give to the model. The Markov chain also plays an important role in my thinking. The same goes with the Heisenberg principle — it doesn't provide a clear understanding, but a half-understanding. Just a structure. Just a skeleton.
